## Default Permission

Permissions par défaut du plugin AdMob : init du SDK et affichage de rewarded ads.

#### This default permission set includes the following:

- `allow-initialize`
- `allow-show-rewarded-ad`

## Permission Table

<table>
<tr>
<th>Identifier</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>


<tr>
<td>

`admob:allow-initialize`

</td>
<td>

Enables the initialize command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`admob:deny-initialize`

</td>
<td>

Denies the initialize command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`admob:allow-show-rewarded-ad`

</td>
<td>

Enables the show_rewarded_ad command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`admob:deny-show-rewarded-ad`

</td>
<td>

Denies the show_rewarded_ad command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>
</table>
